segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a host in a black zip-up sweater, seated at a desk in a studio with a brick wall backdrop and a large 'm' logo, introducing the dramatic topic: 'IS MY SISTER'S FIANCÉ OR MY EX MY BABY'S FATHER?'. He states, "This is Takara. Now, Takara was here six months ago. To reveal a painful secret to her boyfriend Jason and her sister Britney. Take a look at her last appearance." The scene cuts to Takara, a woman in a pink and white patterned top and jeans, sitting beside Jayson, a man in a light blue shirt and jeans, both appearing tense. Dramatic, suspenseful music underscores the scene. Takara is shown in close-up, visibly distressed, with large hoop earrings and a chain necklace, her expression shifting from concern to tears as she emotionally confesses, "My sister really means a lot to me. I've been keeping this secret for a year and it's really hurt me. I know these things are going to hurt my sister." The host prompts her to "Tell her the rest of the secret," to which Takara tearfully reveals, "You know I'm pregnant." A montage of emotional close-ups follows, including a black-and-white shot labeled 'LAST APPEARANCE', and intense color flashes, emphasizing her anguish. Britney's voice screams in disbelief, "Oh my god, Takara, don't tell me it's his baby! Please don't tell me that, please Takara!" as Takara admits, "The baby might be Raymond's," eliciting another horrified scream from Britney. The host announces, "Raymond wants to apologize. It was time to meet Raymond," and Raymond is heard saying, "Britney, I'm sorry, baby," only to be angrily rejected by Britney. The man, identified as 'JAYSON' in a text overlay, is shown sitting alone on stairs, looking downcast. The host then states, "Takara also had to tell her own boyfriend, Jayson," and Takara reveals, "His cousin," referring to Raymond, which the host questions with a surprised, "And that's his cousin?" Loud gasps and screams from the audience erupt as Takara drops the bombshell, "I've been having an affair with Britney's fiancé for a year," followed by more audience shock and a final, "The baby might not be yours," directed at Jayson. The woman, now in a teal top, is seen walking through the studio with Diamond, a man in a green shirt, who appears to be comforting her. The segment ends with Jayson walking away from the studio set, his back to the camera, while Takara looks on with a mix of sorrow and resolve. The atmosphere is heavy with emotional tension, underscored by dramatic lighting, quick cuts between characters, and the constant, building suspense of the background music and audience reactions.

The Host, a man in a black zip-up sweater, holds a yellow 'DDC' box and speaks seriously to the camera, with a split-screen showing a four-year-old boy named Trevion in a green shirt and three men—Andre, Vincent, and John—displayed as potential fathers, while on-screen text asks, '1 TEEN MOM...3 MEN TESTED... WHO'S HER BABY'S FATHER?'. The Host announces, "When it comes to four-year-old Trevion, remember, we're not talking about an infant now. This is a four-year-old child." The camera cuts to close-ups of the three anxious men. The Host then declares, "John, you are not the father!", prompting gasps and murmurs from the studio audience. He continues, "When it comes to four-year-old Trevion, Andre, you are not the father!", followed by more audience reactions. Finally, he states, "And when it comes to four-year-old Trevion, Vincent, you are not the father!", at which point Tandra, a 19-year-old Black woman in a purple top, seated on a light gray chair, breaks down, screaming "What I tell you! What I tell you, boy! What I tell you, boy! What I tell you! Oh my God! Oh my God! Oh my God! I don't wanna be back here! Let me go!" as she covers her face and cries hysterically. The Host attempts to comfort her, saying "Don't go, don't go. Don't you wanna play games? Stop, stop, stop. It's okay. It's okay. I'm gonna still be here, man. He ain't going nowhere. Look at me, man," as she continues to scream "Let me go!". The men react with shock and disappointment; John in a gray shirt stands up abruptly and walks away, visibly upset, while Andre and Vincent remain stunned. The on-screen text updates to 'TANDRA, 19, JUST FOUND OUT THAT NONE OF THE 3 MEN TESTED ARE HER SON'S FATHER'. The Host guides the sobbing Tandra to a couch, where she collapses, her face buried in her hands, as the studio audience reacts with shock and empathy, and the dramatic lighting emphasizes the emotional weight of the devastating reveal. The segment concludes with Tandra being comforted by the Host amidst the studio crew, capturing the raw aftermath.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a television studio with a brick wall backdrop and stage lighting, where the Host, a man in a black shirt, stands at a podium, gesturing expressively as he dramatically introduces a paternity case, narrating, "They make an instant connection. The bond was so strong that Shawn literally walked 250 miles to meet Terra for the first time. But as fast as he walked into her life, he walked out. Because a month later, Terra got pregnant and Shawn abandoned her." On a large screen behind him, Shawn, a man in a teal shirt, is shown in a split-screen with a baby, while on-screen text reads, 'MY BROTHER BETRAYED ME... IS HE MY BABY'S FATHER?' The audience reacts with gasps and excitement. The Host continues, "So now Terra has a three-month-old son named Braden. And Shawn has never even met him. Do you think they look alike?" The camera cuts to the audience, then to Terra (previously identified as Janice), a woman with long red hair, in a teal top with black accents and a lip piercing, now seated on a gray couch, visibly upset and crying, covering her mouth. Terra, with an emotional voice, responds, "I think yeah, Shawn's eye color but I think he looks like my son that passed away." The Host then asks, "So, after you after he walked, how long did you all stay together?" Terra replies, "For about a month. And then I found out I was pregnant." The Host follows up, "Yes. What did he do?" Terra continues, "He was happy at first and then people started telling him I..." as her speech is cut off. The audience reacts with shock and excitement, some clapping and others gasping. The Host returns to the podium, continuing to address the audience with animated hand gestures, maintaining the dramatic atmosphere. The segment ends with a close-up of Shawn, speaking directly to the camera with a serious expression, as the on-screen text reiterates the central question: 'MY BROTHER BETRAYED ME... IS HE MY BABY'S FATHER?'
